name: DUCOMMUN INC /DE/
summary: PART I GENERAL Ducommun Incorporated (Ducommun, the Company, we, us or our) is a leading designer and manufacturer of and provider of manufacturing solutions for high-performance products often used in high-cost-of failure applications primarily in the aerospace and defense (A&D), industrial, medical and other industries (collectively, Industrial).
